projects.title: AI-Powered Document Retrieval & Processing System
projects.description: Document processing workflow using Python and AWS to ingest, organize, and retrieve unstructured content for question-answering and knowledge access.
highlights: Built end-to-end pipeline for ingesting and retrieving unstructured content for Q&A use cases.
Implemented retrieval-augmented workflow combining parsing, indexing, and context-aware response generation.
Designed processing steps for extracting and transforming raw content into structured outputs for analytics and AI applications.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Conversation for Disease Diagnosis
projects.description: Multi-agent LLM system simulating doctor-patient dialogue for disease diagnosis using agentic conversation patterns and medical reasoning.
highlights: Multi-agent architecture coordinating diagnostic reasoning across specialized agents.
Agentic conversation patterns for structured medical knowledge retrieval.
Modular Python pipeline supporting extensible diagnosis workflows.

projects.title: Text Analysis Using NLP (Streamlit)
projects.description: Interactive Streamlit app for text analytics — sentiment analysis, keyword extraction, and NLP-driven insights on user-supplied text.
highlights: Interactive web interface built with Streamlit for real-time text analysis.
NLP pipeline for sentiment classification and keyword extraction.
Lightweight deployment-ready architecture for quick experimentation.

projects.title: Multimodal Live RAG Voice
projects.description: Multimodal RAG system combining voice input with retrieval-augmented generation for live conversational knowledge access.
highlights: Combines voice input with retrieval-augmented generation for hands-free Q&A.
Multimodal approach integrating audio and text for richer context understanding.
Real-time pipeline supporting live conversational interactions.

projects.title: End-to-End Pipeline: Snowflake + dbt + Tableau
projects.description: Complete data engineering pipeline using Snowflake for warehousing, dbt for transformation, and Tableau for visualization.
highlights: End-to-end data pipeline from ingestion through transformation to visualization.
dbt models for clean, testable SQL transformations in Snowflake.
Tableau dashboards for business intelligence and reporting.

projects.title: Vulnerability Detection
projects.description: Research project on automated software vulnerability detection using machine learning and NLP techniques.
highlights: ML-based approach to detecting software vulnerabilities from source code.
Research paper with comprehensive evaluation and analysis.
Python pipeline for feature extraction and classification.

projects.title: Phoneme Recognition Using GMM
projects.description: Gaussian Mixture Model-based phoneme recognition system for speech processing and audio analysis.
highlights: GMM-based acoustic modeling for phoneme classification.
Audio feature extraction and signal processing pipeline.
Evaluation framework for recognition accuracy benchmarking.

projects.title: Single-Class SVM for Speaker Change Detection
projects.description: Event detection in audio using single-class SVM for identifying speaker change points in conversations.
highlights: Single-class SVM approach for unsupervised speaker change detection.
Audio segmentation pipeline for conversation analysis.
Research-driven evaluation on real-world audio datasets.

projects.title: Particle Explosion Simulation
projects.description: Interactive particle explosion simulation built in C++ demonstrating graphics programming and physics modeling.
highlights: Real-time particle physics simulation with C++.
Visual effects rendering with custom graphics pipeline.
Performance-optimized for smooth interactive visualization.
